title: Aanandha Yazhai  Lyrics Thanga Meengal Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aanandha Yazhai
Singer: Sriram Parthasarathy 
Movie: Thanga Meengal
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics: Na MuthuKumar

Aanandha Yazhai meetukiraai
adi nenjil vannam theetukiraai
Anbennum kudayai neetukiraai
adhil aayiram mazhai thuli kootukiraai

Iru nenjam inaindhu pesida
baashaigal edhuvum thevayillai
Siru pullil urangum paniyil
theriyum mazhayin azhago thaangavillai
un kaigal pidithu pogum vazhi
podhavillai innum vendumadi
Indha mannil idhupol yaarum ingae
engum vazhavillai endru thondrudhai

Aanandha Yazhai meetukiraai
adi nenjil vannam theetukiraai
Anbennum kudayai neetukiraai
adhil aayiram mazhai thuli kootukiraai

Dhoorathu marangal paarkudhadi
dhevadhai ivalaa ketkudhadi
thannilai marandha pookaladi
kaatrinil vaasam thookudhadi

Adi kovil edharku dheivangal edharku
unnadhu punnagai podhumadi
Indha mannil idhupol yaarum ingae
engum vazhavillai endru thondrudhai

Aanandha Yazhai meetukiraai
adi nenjil vannam theetukiraai

Un mugam paarthaal thonudhai
vaanathu nilavu chinnadhadi
Megathil maraindhe paarkudhadi
unnidam velicham ketkudhadi
Adhai kaiyil pidithu aarudhal uraithu
veetuku anuppu nallapadi

Indha mannil idhupol yaarum ingae
engum vazhavillai endru thondrudhai

Aanandha Yazhai meetukiraai
adi nenjil vannam theetukiraai (2)

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aanandha Yazhai from the critically acclaimed movie Thanga Meengal is a soul-stirring melody that resonates with deep emotions. Composed by the talented Yuvan Shankar Raja and beautifully sung by Sriram Parthasarathy, this song captures the essence of parental love and longing. Experience the heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar that add a poetic charm to this unforgettable musical masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: Song: Aanandha Yazhai Singer: Sriram Parthasarathy Movie: Thanga Meengal Music: Yuvan Lyrics: Na MuthuKumar
You play the joyful lute, coloring my heart with hues. You extend the umbrella of love, gathering a thousand raindrops within.

When two hearts converse, no language is needed. The beauty of rain seen in the dew resting on a small blade of grass cannot be contained. The path your hands hold to walk is not enough; I desire more. It feels like no one else in this world lives as we do.
You play the joyful lute, coloring my heart with hues. You extend the umbrella of love, gathering a thousand raindrops within.
Distant trees seem to ask if you are an angel. Flowers that have forgotten themselves sway in the breeze, spreading fragrance.
Why temples and gods? Your smile is enough. It feels like no one else in this world lives as we do.
You play the joyful lute, coloring my heart with hues.
Seeing your face feels like the moon in the sky is small. Hidden behind clouds, it observes you, seeking light from you. Holding it in my hands, I send comfort and light to your home.
It feels like no one else in this world lives as we do.
You play the joyful lute, coloring my heart with hues.
